callout.p: 补图：当前用户消息链路由 React Console 或 magcli/sdk 发起，经 Express API 写入 session_events，再异步调用 runUserMessage，由 OpenAI-compatible provider 决策工具调用，最后交给 sandbox runtime 执行。

whiteboard: flowchart TB User[User] -- message --> UI[React Console / magcli / SDK] UI -- POST /v1/sessions/{id}/events --> API[Express API] API -- createSessionEvent user.message --> DB[(SQLite session_events)] API -- void runUserMessage --> Runner[runner.ts] Runner -- set status running --> DB Runner -- messages + tools --> Provider[provider.ts] Provider -- tool_calls? --> Runner Runner -- executeTool --> Runtime[runtime.ts] Runtime -- bash/read/write/list/grep/memory --> Sandbox[Docker or E2B] Sandbox -- stdout/files --> Runtime Runtime -- artifact scan/sync --> Artifacts[Host artifacts] Runtime -- tool result --> Runner Runner -- agent/tool/session events --> DB DB -- EventSource stream --> UI
